---
title: "The Rev. Bernard Robert Wilson"
---

## The Rev. Bernard Robert Wilson

**Dates:** (b. 1858/9-1909)

### Description

Vicar of Portsea, third son of the Rev. Robert Wilson, Vicar of Rownhams

### Biography

A scholar of Keble College, Oxford. [<i>Alumni Oxonienses</i> ; obituary <i>The Times</i>, 18 October 1909]

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
